mapper.select:
SELECT /* 프로젝트 전체 이슈 */ p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS newIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS progress, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS solution, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS returnIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completion
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code
LEFT JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code
WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND p.project_code = #{projectCode} GROUP BY p.project_code, p.project_name

SELECT n.notice_code AS noticeCode, n.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, n.title AS title, n.created_at AS createdAt FROM projects p JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode}
UNION
SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code
JOIN notices n ON n.project_code = p.project_code
WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND p.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
